title: Eclat Cristal D'Arques Longchamp Mixer Glass, Crystal, 28 cl, Pack of 6
features: Extra strong crystal glass – Arc’s innovative new crystalline glass material is up to 50% more resistant than market standards
Produced in France – lead-free crystal and designed to be environmentally friendly
Dishwasher safe – tested to be as brilliant and pure after 300 dishwasher cycles
Exceptional transparency – transparency index of 98.9, superior to market standards
Perfect acoustics – the composition of our crystal glass gives it a clear, pure sound
description: Product Description ECLAT Cristal D'Arques is made from extra strong crystal glass – Arc’s innovative new crystalline glass material, which is up to 50% more resistant than market standards. Produced in France, this lead-free crystal is designed to be environmentally friendly, is dishwasher safe, and has been tested to be as brilliant and pure after 300 dishwasher cycles as the day it was made. This crystal glass also has exceptional transparency with an index of 98.9; superior to market standards, and perfect acoustics – the composition gives it a clear, pure sound. For luxurious quality and elegance at an affordable price, the ECLAT Cristal D’Arques Paris collection is the perfect choice for any household, dining party or special gift. ECLAT Cristal D’Arques will add a classic touch of luxury to any home and occasion. Arc International France is a global leader in tableware, producing and distributing quality products to more than 160 countries. ECLAT Cristal D’Arques joins Luminarc and Arc opal within the Arc Group as household names for quality and style, bringing you affordable luxury from a brand you can trust. Box Contains 6 x glasses
